title: Hunter / pursuit / fear talent cleanup
notes: Bounty Hunter, Force Hunter, Outlaw, Cowardice, Infamy, Bothan Spynet, Infiltration, Genoharadan/Genohardan, Brigand, and Master of Intrigue were reviewed as one hunter/pursuit/fear phase.
Unsafe migrated always-on modifiers/effects were removed from the scoped trees except the safe static +1 insight Fortitude/Will rows on Jedi Hunter.
Target-specific, fear, minion, stealth, pursuit, and reaction effects now surface as action/reference cards or opt-in attack options rather than permanent actor mutations.
Jedi Hunter now exposes the Force Sensitivity damage die as a target-checked attack option while preserving its static defense bonuses.
remainingLimitations: Several reaction cards depend on future post-hit/post-miss/post-damage event windows; the data now has reaction keys/metadata but not all triggers are automatically surfaced by the chat bridge.
Compendium source text for Outlaw duplicate Seize the Moment/Find an Opening and Infamy Notorious remains garbled; those entries are flagged for exact-text review instead of inventing mechanics.
Bothan Spynet target-analysis benefits still require the player/GM to confirm the successful Knowledge/Gather Information check and valid target before toggling attack options.
